name: Technical Equipment Cleaners
self_description: Technical Equipment Cleaners is North Lake Tahoe's first and most experienced outdoor gear cleaning and repair company. We've restored, repaired, and re-waterproofed your adventures since 2006!

name: Truckee Boardhouse
self_description: Truckee Boardhouse is first and foremost a family operation, started by a husband and wife team that met working in a snowboard shop. We wanted to create a shop that felt welcoming and catered to the whole family and all levels.

name: W&T Graphix
self_description: W & T Graphix has produced tens of thousands of personalized T-shirts hats and other promotional items each year. The business has been located in Truckee since 1992 when owners Wes and Tonya Beyer moved it from its original location in Reno, Nevada.

name: Moonshine Ink
self_description: Moonshine Ink is North Lake Tahoe/Truckee's independent newspaper, on streets since 2002. We produce a monthly print publication with 24,000 readers along with thousands more a month on this website.

name: Nevada County Library Penn Valley Branch
self_description: The Nevada County Library system consists of six library locations.

name: Sierra Sun
self_description: The Sierra Sun, formerly known as the Truckee Sun, and its predecessors have been published in Truckee since 1869. One of California's longest-running local newspapers, rooted in Truckee since 1869.

name: Split Rock Music Co.
self_description: Located in the heart of Downtown Truckee, Split Rock Music is your musical destination in the North Lake Tahoe region. We proudly offer a diverse array of services, including music lessons and a comprehensive retail selection of instruments and music supplies.

name: Truckee Tahoe Radio - 101.5 KTKE
self_description: Our Mission is to entertain and inform the local community. We are INDEPENDENT so we can play and talk about what YOU want to hear. Our format is Triple A, which means we play a wide variety of music.

name: Word after Word Books
self_description: Word After Word Books is a local Indie Bookstore located in Historic Downtown Truckee. We strive to be a welcoming space for our community and visitors to connect around books.

name: Alibi Ale Works
self_description: We opened the doors to our humble brewery in North Lake Tahoe back in 2014 with a commitment to world-class beer, community-building, and good times for all! Today our public houses in Incline Village, NV and Truckee, CA are welcoming community hubs with a laid-back mountain vibe where happy people gather for fresh beer, tasty food, live music, and special events.

name: Alpenswing
self_description: Alpenswing offers a lively and welcoming atmosphere perfect for all ages, combining great drinks, tasty light snacks, and fun for the whole family. Guests can enjoy our state-of-the-art golf simulators featuring Trackman technology for a realistic and engaging experience, as well as thrilling axe throwing.

name: Bar of America
notes: Hours, menu links, and external references only; no self-description

name: Blue Cow Deli
self_description: A small-town sandwich shop in a friendly & scenic country setting. Blue Cow Deli offers the area's finest lunch menu. With a spacious ranch-style dining room and a lovely dog-friendly patio the deli offers a unique and comfortable experience.

name: Blue Coyote Bar & Grill
self_description: Founded with a passion for adventure, authenticity, and community, Blue Coyote Truckee is more than just a brand—it's a lifestyle rooted in the wild, expansive spirit of Northern California and the endless possibility of the outdoors.

name: Burger Me!
self_description: PREMIUM LOCAL AND DELICIOUS! Gourmet varieties Beef, Bison, Chicken, Turkey, Lamb, Ahi Tuna, Cod & Veggie

name: Casa Baeza Mexican Restaurant
self_description: Indulge in the authentic flavors of Mexico at Casa Baeza in Truckee, California, where culinary tradition meets taste in every dish. With over 30 years of local legacy and an impressive 500+ 5-star Google reviews, Casa Baeza has become a beloved icon in the community.
